finding_results.notes: The dawn return now ends on Marcia's concrete morning directive: Tiana must bring the folder, the offices will be called when they open, and Delroy is barred from slipping out before accounting for the damage.
finding_results.summary: The closing beat now produces a fresh family action and leverage shift instead of ending on unresolved atmosphere alone.
